steps: Contact Deutsche Bank Custody to report overpayment of EUR 3,093.75 on Deutsche Bank AG dividend for account 801234567
Request refund based on DE-NO tax treaty rate of 26.375% vs applied 25% withholding
Provide treaty documentation showing Norwegian residents qualify for reduced withholding on German dividends
Follow up with custodian's tax reclaim department for expedited processing of overpayment return

references.title: German Federal Ministry of Finance – Tax Treaties
